description: Product Description Rex rabbit hair fur pom keychain comes with a lovely and exquisite design, looks so stylish and beautiful, and can be used as a key ring, bag decoration, backpack accessories, gifts, decorations, and even clothing. Make it a surprise gift for your loved ones, friends, and family, suitable for backpacks, wallets, car keychains, mobile phone cases, bag charm, etc. Specification Color Material Total Length Width Package List Advantage Heart puff ball keychains are made of faux rabbit fur, soft and with great color fastness, with a soft and comfortable hand feel, has 18 different bright colors can choose from, adding a touch of elegance to your everyday life. the key chains are made of metal alloy, durable and practical. Instruction Fur ball keychain with loop and lobster clasp, slide the lobster clasp through the loop or hole on your keys or bags, securely attached, ensuring you never lose your keys again. Note: The furry ball may be not so fluffy in the package, just shake it will puff up.
